title: Parkio Daily for April 27, 2026
teaser: Toy Story 5 merchandise debuts ahead of June theatrical release. Parks operating normally with typical weekend crowds.

bignews.title: Toy Story 5 Merchandise Now Available
bignews.body: Disney Consumer Products has launched a wide range of Toy Story 5-themed merchandise ahead of the film's June 19 theatrical release. New products include interactive figures from Mattel, LEGO playsets, collectibles from Funko, and travel accessories from Away. The collection features classic characters like Woody, Buzz, and Jessie, plus newcomers Lilypad and Smarty Pants.

topstories.title: Interactive Toy Story Figures Talk to Each Other
topstories.body: Mattel's new Toy Story 5 Playscale Interactables line brings imaginative play to a new level. The Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Lilypad, and Forky figures come with iconic phrases and can recognize and talk to each other, creating dynamic play experiences.

topstories.title: Crocs Releases Jessie-Inspired Boots
topstories.body: Crocs will launch Toy Story 5 themed boots on June 16. The Jessie Boot features denim and cow print collar, red trim with white lacing, and four Jessie-themed Jibbitz charms. The Western-inspired design captures the character's iconic style.

topstories.title: Away Travel Collection Features Toy Story Characters
topstories.body: Away will debut a Toy Story 5 travel collection on June 9 with rolling luggage, backpacks, and bag charms for kids and adults. Designs feature Woody, Buzz Lightyear, Jessie, Aliens, and newcomer Lilypad.

icymi.title: LeapFrog Explore & Learn Lilypad Debuts
icymi.body: LeapFrog's new interactive toy inspired by Toy Story 5's Lilypad character lets kids explore letters, numbers, and problem-solving skills. The device allows children to send text messages to Toy Story characters using emojis and preset messages.

icymi.title: Pandora Toy Story Jewelry Arrives May 21
icymi.body: Pandora will release a Toy Story collection on May 21 featuring a Sheriff Star Bracelet with blue and brown leather and an embossed sheriff star charm inspired by Woody. Available online and in select retail locations.

spotlight.title: Planning Your Park Visit This Week
spotlight.body: With spring weather drawing crowds to the parks, arrive early and use mobile ordering to maximize your day. Check park hours and Lightning Lane availability through the official apps before heading out.
